hero.hero_overview: Edith is one of the unique heroes in mlbb. It's the only one with the role of a marksman and a tank.
hero.hero_strength: Given that this hero has a marksman and tank role, it is expected that it has a range and dps of a marksman and crowd control and sustainability of a tank. Edith fits well on this standard. She can be an initiator on her base form with her cc and she can be a damage dealer when she is in ultimate skill form. It is also worth mentioning that her passive deals hp based damage and it can deal multiple times at once based on her attack speed.
hero.hero_weakness: Like most of the heroes, its weaknesses are crowd control, heroes that can out sustain her and burst. Edith also having a hard time on a match up with high mobility enemy heroes.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker suits this hero because it allows many plays like creating combo with skill 1 and 2 for initiating while in her base form, and added mobility while in ultimate form.

hero.hero_overview: Edith is a unique hero who combines defense and offense, controlling a powerful shield and transforming into an aggressive form when needed. She can absorb damage and surprise enemies, making her versatile for different roles.
hero.hero_strength:
1. Versatility. She can switch between defense and offense to adapt to different situations.
2. High Durability. Her shield absorbs damage, making her hard to take down.
3. Crowd Control .She has abilities that restrict enemy movement, helping her team in fights.
hero.hero_weakness:
1. Transformation Dependency.She becomes vulnerable if caught in the wrong form.

2. Susceptible to Crowd Control.She can be easily disabled by abilities that restrict movement or attacks.

3. Requires Good Timing.Misusing her abilities can leave her exposed to enemy attacks.

data.title: Edith's Hero Synopsis

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Edith can pull the enemy to the Assassin which can be a auto kill.

The holy trinity of spell vamp and Stuns.

counters.counter_desc: Dyrroth has the ability to break your armor which can kill her within seconds. Any shield breaking hero is her counter basically.
She just becomes edith if she gets her ult.

dominants.dominant_desc: Help Jungler with the buff, Head to mid lane bush unnoticed then attack them dealing as much as you can without getting too hurt. Help with litho then rotate to the lane with the weaker hero. Get level 4 as quickly as possible and save flicker for turtle fight. Try to position yourself on the top of turtle and try to lock their Jungler.
Try to help and invade the opponent Jungler but if you are losing focus on saving the Marksman of your team then try to get your items by killing minions
Edith should be very strong by now, don't be shy to use your ult and if you have, use inspire or flicker to deal as much damage as you can, To the enemy or the towers of the opponents.

emblems.emblem_desc: The Tank emblem is the ideal choice for Edith, as it complements her role as a tank. Within the emblem setup, prioritize **Vitality** for the early-game health boost, which helps her survive early engagements and initiations. **Festival of Blood** is another great option, as it provides spell vamp, allowing her to sustain better by healing from damage dealt to enemies and minions. However, the most crucial talent is **Concussive Blast**—it not only helps your jungler clear buffs and creeps faster but also adds extra damage for clearing lane minions. This is especially useful when supporting teammates who are struggling in their lane or when you need some extra gold for items.

equips.equip_desc: Tough Boots are essential for Edith as they reduce the duration of crowd control effects like stuns allowing her to stay in the fight longer As for Thunderbelt its a great item but it can be swapped out depending on the situation If the enemy team has high damage heroes consider replacing Thunderbelt with an item that counters their damage type whether its physical magic or true damage This flexibility ensures Edith remains durable and effective against the enemys strongest heroes.

Edith performs exceptionally well with Inspire, as it allows her to easily secure objectives like Turtles and Lords, while also shredding through high enemy defenses. This makes her a formidable force in battles. I highly recommend this build when facing squishy heroes, as it maximizes her damage output and dominance in the game.

If you have to exp then here is great build, which can take on almost 80% of all exp heroes and some of the heroes she cant take can just be countered by items. Buy dominance if there are heal heroes other than that this build she slash thru them like slicing thru a piece of cake

hero.hero_overview: Edith is an incredibly powerful character, even in her base form. To maximize her potential early on, prioritize unlocking Skill 1 first. After that, assist your jungler and then stealthily rotate to the mid-lane bush without being detected. Once in position, unleash as much damage as possible on the mid-laner to secure an early advantage. With her versatility and strong roaming potential, Edith can dominate the map when played strategically.
hero.hero_strength: Edith can dish out consistent stuns with her 2-1-3 combo in her base form, but she becomes even deadlier during her ultimate. For maximum impact, try using her 2nd and 1st skills simultaneously to chain crowd control and damage. While Inspire is a viable option, Flicker works exceptionally well if your team already has a strong damage dealer, as it enhances her mobility and positioning. Even in her base form, Edith can easily take down squishy targets, especially when paired with Thunderbelt for added burst and slow.
hero.hero_weakness: Edith is particularly vulnerable to shield-breaking heroes like Dyrroth, so always be cautious when facing them. Additionally, during her ultimate, she becomes more exposed, so prioritize positioning and safety to avoid being caught out. Despite these weaknesses, Edith remains a strong and reliable roamer when played with awareness and strategy.

data.recommend: Carry your team to victory with Edith!

spell.spell_desc: Edith, as a roamer, greatly benefits from Flicker, especially in competitive matches. Flicker enhances her ability to set up plays and support her team with well-timed stuns. Combos like Flicker-2 or Flicker-1 can be game-changers, allowing you to initiate chain stuns and catch opponents completely off guard. Mastering these combos can turn the tide of team fights in your favor.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Edith is highly versatile and compatible with most team compositions, especially when playing in the EXP lane. Whether paired with squishy roamers like Angela, Estes, or Saber, or traditional tank roamers, she adapts well. Angela, for instance, complements Edith with shields, healing, and increased movement speed, compensating for Edith's lack of mobility. This synergy not only boosts Edith's sustain but also allows her to absorb more damage, filling her wrath gauge and enhancing her overall damage output in the later stages of a fight.

counters.counter_desc: Edith's counter is X-Borg, who excels against tanky heroes like her. X-Borg's true damage ignores defense and scales with the target's HP percentage, making him particularly effective against Edith's high durability. Additionally, his high survivability, strong sustain, and decent ranged attacks give him an advantage, allowing him to wear Edith down while staying out of reach of her counterattacks.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the early game, she isn't very strong as an EXP laner but can sustain due to her tankiness. Playing safely is crucial during this phase. After reaching level four, she can act as a frontliner, provide vision during turtle or lord fights, and serve as a sub-tank. In the mid to late game, her ultimate becomes a major strength, allowing her to deal high damage, secure objectives, and take down towers or enemies effectively. The wrath gauge is critical throughout—its fullness determines her power, so managing it carefully is key to her effectiveness.

equips.equip_desc: Edith's equipment build focuses on balancing durability and damage. Thunderbelt is essential for providing extra defense and scaling her damage early on.Tough Boots add magical defense, movement speed, and crowd control reduction, ensuring she can cast her ultimate effectively.Feather of Heaven is great for a damage-focused build, increasing attack speed, magical damage, and lifesteal, which synergize with her ultimate. Dominance Ice counters enemies with high sustainability, reducing healing effects while boosting physical defense. Oracle enhances magical defense and healing, improving her lifesteal and sustain. Athena's Shield is ideal against burst magic damage, adding survivability and helping her stay effective in team fights.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: The perfect match partner for Edith is Estes or Rafaela, as they provide healing and sustain, keeping her alive longer during fights. Their support ensures Edith can frontline effectively in her tank form and maximize her damage in marksman form.

counters.counter_desc: Valir counters Edith with his long-range poke, crowd control, and burst damage, disrupting her positioning and melting her health in Marksman Form.

dominants.dominant_desc: Select 1st skill in early game to clear minions wave in distance and knock up enemy within range to avoid taking much damege till lv.4 and in late game take some damage before using ult to turn into marksman form  so that is can deal more damge when it's passive bar is full (red bar below HP)

emblems.emblem_desc: The Tank Emblem is best for Edith, offering durability and synergy with her tank form, while Concussive Blast boosts AoE damage.

equips.equip_desc: I used this build frequently because it have attack speed from Feather of Heaven and from Encourage boots with inspire to deal enough damge and Guardian helmet so that Edith players don't have to recall base everytime when it's HP is low and continue assisting in team fight.

data.recommend: Master both forms, use Inspire for max damage, position wisely, time Primal Wrath well, pair with healers or CC heroes, and adapt your build based on the game.

spell.spell_desc: Edith uses Inspire to boost her attack speed and damage output during her Marksman Form, maximizing her ability to finish off enemies after transforming.

data.title: Master Edith : Exp X Roam

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
To maximize Edith's potential, consider teaming up with heroes who can compliment her strengths and cover her weaknesses:

- Slow movement enemies
- Tanky Initiators
- Damage dealers
- Support heroes

counters.counter_desc:
Avoid this counter that can Disrupt Edith's skills.

- Hard CC
- Soft CC
- Skill Disruption
- Damage reflection
- Shield

dominants.dominant_desc:
- Take enemy's minion by kill it before meets with our minions in halfway.

- Avoid enemy from taking gold and exp from minions.

- Adapt to the situation. Be flexible and adjust your strategy based on the current game state

- Use ultimate wisely. Setup ultimate wisely to maximize its impact.

- Communicate with your teamates. Coordinate with your teamate to execute successfully lane pushing or teamfight wars.

It help to consistently pushing and ganking, while significantly impact the game.

- Take/cut Lane on it's minion to get gold and exp while prevent enemy from getting that.

- Coordinate Enemy's Jungler: Track the Jungler's enemy and try to steals it's creep/buff to prevent the from getting levels.

- Secure the map: To avoid ganking and helps jungler to get vision of enemy.

- Continuously pushing lane: Push Lane and gain levels for objectives.

- Initiate Team Fights: Try to setup war if there any chances.

- Disrupt Enemy Rotations: Interfere with the enemies team plans.

- Alert on Turtle/Lord: If the team/enemy want to take turtle/lord, try to alert to help teamate execute it easily.

- Don't Be Afraid to Leave Lane: if there's better opportunity.

- Focus on teamfights: Participate in teamfights to secure objectives.

- Protect Damage Dealer: Shield your backline Damage dealers from enemy's attack.

- Secure the Lord: Prioritize securing the Lord to gain advantage and map control.

- Control Minions: Manage minion waves to control map pressure.

- Command Team for split Push: Coordinate with your teamate to split push and distract enemies.

- Adapt Builds: Change build items according to enemy's items to counter and push lane effectively.

emblems.emblem_desc: Emblem Tank are suitable since it gives additional defense which is useful for Edith. Emblem talent 1: Swift, to increase attack speed for her ultimate's essential. Emblem talent 2: Tenacity, gives additional defenses for Edith to be able for long time of period in fights while gives damages for her passive ultimate. For Emblem talent 3: Brave Smite, can helps Edith to recover her HP during using a skill in the fight.

equips.equip_desc: Tough Boots are better to use when opponents have more crowd control/magic damage type hero. Thunder Belt buy first in order to collect stacks to deal massive damage in basic attacks. Feather of Heaven will boost attack speeds and gives magic basic attacks. Dominance Ice necessary if enemy have healing, lifesteal and spell vamp type hero. Oracle increase lifesteal of Edith for long time fight. Immortal can helps to revive when being ganked or killed instantly.

hero.hero_overview: Edith is a unique hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, known as the Forsaken Warden. She is the first tank-marksman dual-role hero in the game which offering a versatile playstyle.
hero.hero_strength:
☆ Flexible: Able to be built as tanker or damage dealer.

☆ Strong in teamfights: * Base mode, giving crowd control skill.
                                           * Ultimate, can turn the tide of a battle.

☆ High Damage: In her ultimate marksman mode, she can deal a continous and significant damage to enemies while increasing her HP.
hero.hero_weakness:
☆ Reliant on Ultimate: Edith's power is tied to her ultimate ability.

☆ Vulnerable Early Game: Edith's weak if still unequipped/incomplete a good items.

☆ Requires Skills: Edith necessary to be practiced to master in order to adapt with her skill combos.

data.recommend: You can check this out on how to build items for Edith I EXP LANE!🔥

spell.spell_desc:
Inspire: A Burst Tool for Edith

Inspire is a great and suitable battle spell for Edith in Exp Lane in order to boost her damage. It can help Edith to:

- Boost Attack Speed: Increase her attack speed 1.5 times cap to 500%.

- Boost Damage: Deal super burst magic damage in 5s through basic attacks.

- Increase HP Restoration: Through ultimate and her passive, she can rapidly increase lifesteal to be able to compete with enemies.

dominants.dominant_desc:
* Don't stay in one lane for too long. Keep rotating to different lanes to maintain map pressure.
 
 * Communicate with your team. Coordinate with your teammates to execute successful ganks and team fights.

 * Use your ultimate wisely. Time your ultimate to maximize its impact.

 * Adapt to the situation. Be flexible and adjust your strategy based on the current game state.

By following these tips and consistently roaming, you can significantly impact the game and help your team.

* Help Jungler: Assist your jungler in securing the first buff.
 
* Steal Enemy Buff: If the opportunity arises, steal the enemy's jungle buff.

* Secure Lithowanderer: Control the Lithowanderer to gain vision of enemy movements.
 
* Gank Mid Lane: Gank the mid lane to pressure the enemy mid laner.
 
* Help Gold Lane: Support your gold laner to secure kills and farm.

* Continuously Rotate: Keep rotating between lanes to help your team.

* Initiate Team Fights: Use your ultimate, to start team fights.
 
* Be the Eyes of Gold and EXP Lane: Keep an eye on the gold and EXP lanes to provide support or warn your teammates of danger.
 
* Disrupt Enemy Rotations: Interfere with the enemy team's plans.
 
* Alert Team about Turtle and Lord: Inform your team about the timing of Turtle and Lord.
 
* Don't Be Afraid to Leave Your Lane: If there's a better opportunity.

* Focus on Team Fights: Participate in team fights to secure objectives.

 * Protect Your Core Heroes: Shield your damage dealers from enemy attacks.
 
 * Secure the Lord: Prioritize securing the Lord to gain map control.

 * Control Minions: Manage minion waves to control map pressure.
 
 * Command Team for Split Push: If necessary, coordinate with your team to split push and distract the enemy.

 * Adapt Your Build: Change your build to counter enemy items and push lanes effectively.

emblems.emblem_desc: By using this emblem setup, you'll be able to maximize Edith's tankiness and survivability, making her a formidable force on the battlefield.

equips.equip_desc:
This build makes Edith tough and helps her protect her team. Her ultimate, turns her into a powerful marksman, making her even stronger in team fights.

* The choice of boots depends on the specific match-up between Warrior or Tough Boots with or without Encourage blessing.

* The last two items can be swapped based on the specific match-up, this core build provides a solid foundation for success.

hero.hero_overview: Edith is a unique hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, known as the Forsaken Warden. She's the first tank-marksman dual-role hero in the game, offering a versatile playstyle.
hero.hero_strength:
* Flexible: Can be built as a tank or a damage dealer.
 
 * Strong in Team Fights: Her ultimate, can turn the tide of a battle.

 * High Damage: In her marksman form, she can deal significant damage.
hero.hero_weakness:
* Reliant on Ultimate: Her power is tied to her ultimate ability.
 
* Vulnerable Early Game: She's weak before she gets strong items.
 
* Requires Skill: She's a complex hero that takes practice to master.

data.recommend: Shout out for roamer out there, our jobs it's more than meat shield. BE A COMMANDER, SHUT THE BABIES PLAYER. and here is my build for beginners roamer, Edith. To be shield or bash your shield, GG.

spell.spell_desc:
Flicker: A Versatile Tool for Edith

Flicker is a great spell for Edith, no matter if she's a tank or a damage dealer. It can help her:

 * Move Quickly: Get to enemies faster or escape danger.
 
 * Dodge Attacks: Avoid enemy abilities that could hurt her.

 * Position Better: Find the best spot to fight or hide.

data.title: Warden's Wings

spell.spell_desc: N

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Your Skill 1 and Skill 2 can easily interrupt Phoveus when he is about to chain his ultimate and prevent him from performing multiple dashes of his ultimate.

counters.counter_desc:
Khaleed's S2 literally stops himself on the spot and gets cancelled when he is stunned, and you have two CC abilities. See where is this is going?

Not to mention that the current Tank build Khaleed still melts to Edith, as her passive deals %Max HP Magic Damage.

Edith can also immediately use her Skill 2 when an ally is getting engaged on by Khaleed, forcing him to waste his Flicker or his ultimate to escape.

Do you dislike facing Ling because he can just use his ultimate to pick off your teammates? Don't worry, Edith can solve that issue. 

Simply time and aim your Skill 1 at the center of his ultimate (and before he lands, of course), and you will see Ling stop dead in his tracks, unable to do anything.

Oh, and he can't fight you either because you have more damage output than him during ultimate form, and you also build tank items, and you have two CC skills. Ling hates all of the above.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Level up your skill 1 and help your jungler clear their first buff. Use Skill 1 when the timer reaches 00:19, and do some Basic Attacks until your passive runs out, and only then you should go to your lane.

*If your jungler is starting at the Purple Buff, please do not kill or last hit the small Purple Buff creep
dominants.dominant_title: Level 1 - 00:00, Before the first Buff spawns

dominants.dominant_desc:
Use your Skill 1 to hit all three minion waves simultaneously and clear the minions as quickly as possible. Doing this will also trigger your Concussive Blast, allowing you to clear the minions at a very rapid pace.

You can start to trade some hits in after securing level 2 and using your Skill 2 and Basic Attacks to harass them.

Or, you can choose to cut the minion wave and quickly clear it and rotate to the mid lane, or give a hello to the enemy jungler (but don't overstay in the area).

After you secured level 4, rotate to the Turtle and either cover your jungler, or initiate and use all of your skills on the enemies that are likely to attack your fellow jungler/teammates. 

Ideally, you want to use your ultimate when you have accumulated around 40-50% of your passive bar, as it will grant you a significant attack speed boost and DPS.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Edith and her abilities scales with both HP and defenses. Not to mention she gets significantly tankier with the Tank Emblem. 

T1 - Swift: Allows you to do more Basic Attacks, which means you get to trigger your passive more often. 

T2 - Wilderness Blessing: Allows you to rotate around the map quicker. It also enables you to reach bushes quicker, which allows you to gank more successfully.

T3 - Concussive Blast: Allows you to quickly clear minion waves.

equips.equip_desc:
As Edith is primarily a tank character, you don't need to follow the build order too precisely. Instead, you can adapt and optimize the build according to your enemies and matchups.

Thunder Belt is a very strong item that can be built as your first item, as the bonus Hybrid Defense you gain from it's passive  synergizes with your ultimate. 

Though you should get Dominance Ice as your first item when the enemies have sustain skills/characters (Revitalize, Healer Supports, Spell Vamp Fighters).
equips.equip_title: Edith EXP Equipment Set (with Thunder Belt)

equips.equip_desc:
If you don't plan to use Thunder Belt on her, you can go for this build instead; keep in mind that the defense items that you build varies with every game. 

Warrior Boots can be replaced with Tough Boots if you see the enemies have a lot of Crowd Control effects.

hero.hero_overview: Edith has multiple Crowd Control abilties and a really quick minion wave clearing speed. She also scales very well with defense items. In the EXP Lane, she can reach her level 4 quickly and help her team during the first turtle fight.
hero.hero_strength:
Edith's key strength is her ability to effectively be both a tank and a marksman, which gives her versatility in gameplay, suitable for different team compositions. 

She can also be used as a flex pick in the draft, leaving the enemies guessing whether she would be playing as the EXP or as the Roamer, which opens up a lot of possibilities to outdraft your opponents.
hero.hero_weakness: Even though she has a dash on her Skill 2, she is not an agile hero by any means, as it does not go through walls. Her skills are also relativeley slow and very predictable.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is the best Battle Spell for Edith, as it can be paired with her Skill 1 and Skill 2 to catch enemies off guard.
